headlines.description: Aston Villa inflicted more misery on Manchester City on Saturday, defeating them 2-1 in the Premier League with goals from Jhon Duran and former City forward Morgan Rogers.
headlines.shortLinkText: City hit new low as Rogers inspires Villa to win

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest will celebrate Christmas in the Premier League's top four after they handed Brentford their first home defeat of the season with an impressive 2-0 victory at the Gtech Community Stadium on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: High-flying Forest beat Brentford for latest win

headlines.description: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak bagged himself a hat trick as his side thrashed Ipswich Town 4-0 in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Isak nets hat trick as Newcastle hammer Ipswich

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at West Ham United

headlines.description: West Ham United midfielder Mohammed Kudus headed home in the second half to salvage a point in a lacklustre 1-1 Premier League draw with Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham's Kudus secures 1-1 home draw with Brighton

headlines.description: Arsenal's Gabriel Jesus scored twice in a 5-1 win at Crystal Palace, putting his side three points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jesus haunts Palace again in Arsenal rout
